kinesisanalyticsv2.application.sqlapplic: Describes the inputs, outputs, and reference data sources for a SQL-based Kinesis Data Analytics application.

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.sqlapplic.Description: The array of [Input](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kinesisanalytics/latest/apiv2/API_Input.html) objects describing the input streams used by the application.
